_note: Group stage scenarios based on the official December 5, 2025 draw. Update scenario status as matches are played: pending → happened | didnt.

A.summary: Mexico as host opener vs South Africa on June 11. South Korea always dangerous. Czechia the European wildcard.

scenarios.condition: Mexico win their opener vs South Africa
scenarios.outcome: Mexico control their destiny. Group A is theirs to lose.

scenarios.condition: South Africa draw or beat Mexico at the Azteca
scenarios.outcome: Group A is suddenly wide open. Mexico in danger. One of the great shocks.

scenarios.condition: South Korea advance from Group A
scenarios.outcome: Korea continue their run of advancing deep into every World Cup they enter.
Host nation out in the group stage. Azteca devastated.

B.summary: Canada as co-hosts, Bosnia-Herzegovina in their first ever World Cup, Switzerland the dark horse, Qatar likely the weakest team.

scenarios.outcome: Co-hosts in control. Canada's moment is real. Toronto erupts.
Historic first World Cup knockout stage for Bosnia. The Balkan giant arrives.
First World Cup win for Bosnia at Lumen Field. Seattle witnesses history.
Co-hosts go home early. Swiss neutralize the Canadian dream.

C.summary: Brazil vs Morocco is a rematch of 2022's most dramatic quarter — Brazil QF exit, Morocco's historic run. Scotland return after 28 years. Haiti debut.

scenarios.outcome: The most stunning result of the group stage. Morocco prove 2022 was not a fluke.
Scotland's first World Cup knockout appearance since 1958. Nation goes wild.

scenarios.condition: Brazil top Group C with maximum points
scenarios.outcome: Brazil dominant and ominous. Vinicius Jr. in full form heading into the knockout.
Any Haiti point is a triumph — their debut and one of the great underdog moments.

D.summary: USA on home soil, Paraguay and Turkey as serious threats, Australia the Socceroos. USA play in Seattle vs Australia on June 19.

scenarios.condition: USA beat Australia in Seattle on June 19
scenarios.outcome: USMNT at Lumen Field in front of a home crowd. The tournament announcement.

scenarios.condition: Türkiye eliminate USA from Group D
scenarios.outcome: USA knocked out by Turkey. Co-host exits the group stage. Major shock.
Americans building real belief. The home-crowd advantage is tangible.

scenarios.condition: Paraguay advance ahead of USA or Australia
scenarios.outcome: South American quality in a tight group. Paraguay make a statement.

E.summary: Germany's redemption after 2022 group stage disgrace. Ecuador and Ivory Coast as real threats. Curaçao in their first ever World Cup.

scenarios.outcome: Germany are back. Die Mannschaft look like themselves again. 2022 exorcised.

scenarios.condition: Germany exit in the group stage again
scenarios.outcome: Second consecutive group stage elimination. German football faces a genuine crisis.

scenarios.condition: Ivory Coast advance from Group E
scenarios.outcome: Africa's most technically gifted squad reaches the knockouts. Elephants roar.

scenarios.condition: Curaçao get any points in Group E
scenarios.outcome: A genuine World Cup miracle. Island nation of 150,000 on the global stage.

F.summary: Netherlands vs Japan is a 2022 Round of 16 rematch — now a group stage showdown. Sweden return, Tunisia fight to advance.

scenarios.condition: Japan beat Netherlands in the group stage
scenarios.outcome: Japan reverse their 2022 R16 loss in the biggest revenge match of Group F.
Oranje in control. If De Jong and De Bruyne fire, this is a title contender.
Sweden rebuild pays off. Zlatan's era behind them, new generation steps up.
Japan once again defy expectations. Blue Samurai as genuine dark horse confirmed.

G.summary: Two of Group G's four matches are in Seattle — Belgium vs Egypt (June 15) and Egypt vs Iran (June 26). Belgium, Egypt with Salah, Iran, New Zealand.

scenarios.condition: Egypt beat Belgium at Lumen Field on June 15
scenarios.outcome: Mo Salah delivers a defining performance in Seattle. Egypt shock Belgium.
Egypt in the knockouts for the first time since 1990. Salah's legacy moment.

scenarios.condition: Egypt vs Iran in Seattle is a draw
scenarios.outcome: A geopolitically charged stalemate at Lumen Field. The whole world watching June 26.

scenarios.condition: New Zealand advance from Group G
scenarios.outcome: All Whites in the knockouts. OFC's finest ever result. Football's smallest confederation makes history.

H.summary: Spain as reigning Euro champions and strong favorites. Uruguay as CONMEBOL quality. Saudi Arabia and Cape Verde the underdogs.

scenarios.outcome: Spain in dominant form — backs up Euro glory. Looking like potential champions.
South American power derails the reigning European champion. Massive result.

scenarios.condition: Cape Verde advance from Group H
scenarios.outcome: Island nation of 600,000 reaches the knockouts. The tournament's Cinderella story.

scenarios.condition: Saudi Arabia repeat their 2022 Argentina upset on Spain or Uruguay
scenarios.outcome: Back-to-back tournaments, back-to-back shocks. Saudi Arabia as genuine disruptor.

I.summary: France as favorites alongside Haaland's Norway, Senegal 2022 QF, and Iraq's historic return. The most dangerous group in the tournament.

scenarios.outcome: Haaland announces himself at a World Cup. Norway topple the defending runners-up.
France in full force — Mbappé and co. on track. Les Bleus look inevitable.
AFCON champions prove they belong at the world's top table again.

scenarios.condition: Iraq qualify for the Round of 32
scenarios.outcome: Iraq's first World Cup since 1986 — and they advance. One of the best stories in the tournament.

J.summary: Argentina defending champions with Messi. Algeria as Africa's dark horse. Austria as European quality. Jordan's first major tournament.

scenarios.outcome: Champions cruise. Messi managing his minutes for the knockout sprint.

scenarios.condition: Algeria eliminate Argentina from Group J
scenarios.outcome: Defending champions out in the group stage. Messi's last World Cup ends in disaster.
Austria's golden generation finally delivers on the biggest stage.
Jordan's debut World Cup ends in advancement. Arab football's most shocking result since Saudi's 2022 win.

K.summary: Portugal with Cristiano Ronaldo's potential last WC. Colombia as dark horse. Uzbekistan's remarkable qualification story. DR Congo.

scenarios.outcome: Ronaldo's final World Cup begins with command. Portugal looking dangerous.
South American quality — Colombia announce themselves as a genuine World Cup force.

scenarios.condition: Portugal exit in the group stage
scenarios.outcome: Ronaldo's World Cup ends before it begins. Portugal's era over.
Central Asia's first ever World Cup advancement. One of the tournament's great stories.

L.summary: England vs Croatia is a 2018 WC semifinal and Euro 2020/21 final rematch, now in the group stage. Panama and Ghana complete the group.

scenarios.condition: England beat Croatia in the group stage
scenarios.outcome: England exorcise 2018 semifinal demons. Three Lions roar. It's coming home talk begins.

scenarios.condition: Croatia eliminate England from Group L
scenarios.outcome: Modric and company do it again. England's golden generation fails once more.
Ghana exact revenge for 2010. West African football at its peak.
England in control — momentum building. A different kind of tournament for the Three Lions.
